channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Road flooding with rain water, 2nd June
item.description:
The drainage issues in the area are severe. This causes many issues, not only does it pose a risk of lack of surface tension for cars leading to accidents, the lack of drainage causes rain water to back up on house gutters leading to water damage for properties. This issue runs right from Station Road down to the round about on Church Road and beyond.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffics all out, 2nd June
item.description:
Chaos and dangerous

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Southwood Road, New Eltham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flooding in the corner of the road, 2nd June
item.description:
Drain not working Flooding here has happened before Water is above the kerb and going down some driveways
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Bedford Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped mattress, 2nd June
item.description:
Yet again an item has been dumped in this section of paving. The mattress has been left on the street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 57, Croydon Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish Bag, 2nd June
item.description:
Rubbish bag dumped on Woodlands Park Road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Earlswood Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken Glass & Gas Canisters, 2nd June
item.description:
Excessive littler has been here for over 10 days. It includes broken Glass and laughing gas canisters.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Marler Road, Perry Vale, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flooding, 2nd June
item.description:
Road has flooded completely like never before cars are having to slow right down because they could aquaplane or soak people walking to the station or going to school

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 79, Belvedere Road, Upper Belvedere, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti sprayed at 10 Brixton road SW9 6BU on restaurant front shutter La Cazona., 2nd June
item.description:
I like to report graffiti sprayed at 10 Brixton road SW9 6BU on a restaurant front shutter. The restaurant 'La Cazona' has fairly large graffiti sprayed on it. Please can the graffiti be removed it has been there for over two months. I will be very grateful if it is removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Crewdson Road, Oval, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rainwater not draining away, 2nd June
item.description:
After only a few minutes huge puddle of rainwater are forming in the street and not running away in the drains. Drains appear to have a blockage.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 147, Church Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: RedLab, Shelton St, London WC2H 9HE, 2nd June
item.description:
Security of 7 Dials during routine patrol around the jurisdiction found the metal bollard damaged.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 47, Shelton Street, Covent Garden, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Labrunum Close Parking Fire Exit door., 2nd June
item.description:
Labrunum Close parking garage fire exit door not getting locked it should be closed to avoid any tresspassing in garage by any rough sleepers or drug users.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Laburnum Close, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti needs cleaning, 2nd June
item.description:
Please clean the graffiti on the side fence of No.1 Little Thift in the public footpath. entered adjacent to no.1 Little Thrift

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Little Thrift, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vehicle with fake registration plate, 2nd June
item.description:
Vehicle has not moved since I moved here a year ago. Attempts at checking tax and mot fail as it is not registered on .gov website

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Godstow Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: High numbers of drug addict users outside late at night loitering brickworth way., 2nd June
item.description:
Rise of drug addicts loitering around the area on the rise again. Hackney Council need to put CCTV up to safeguard residents. I live in the flats opposite Gainsborough school. Drug users meeting point in brickwork way on daily basis. Misuse of drugs.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brinkworth Way, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti sprayed on green street box at 16 Robstart Street Brixton SW9., 2nd June
item.description:
I like to report graffiti sprayed on a green street box at 16 Robstart Street Brixton SW9. The graffiti is by a park fence facing a block of flats. Unfortunately there is a fair amount of graffiti along this street. Please can it be removed it has been there for approximately three weeks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Robsart Street, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tags on Dream nails Streatham on Shutters, 2nd June
item.description:
Tags on Dream nails Streatham on Shutters Location: 8, Streatham High Road, London, SW16 6EP
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8-9, Streatham High Road, Streatham Hill, Greater London
